chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2731 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.12406/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objections No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on Misc. No.12407/2025. 4. For orders on Misc. No.12408/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For orders on Misc. No.13873/2025. 18.07.2025. Mr. Aijaz Bangash, Advocate for the Petitioner. 1) Urgency granted. 2) Office objections are disposed of having become infructous. 3) Exemption is allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4-6) Through this petition the petitioner is seeking quashment of FIR No.49 of 2025 registered at Police Station FIA, Cyber Crime Cell, Karachi under Sections 13, 14 and 24 of PECA, 2016 read with Section 406, 419, 420, 500, 468, 471 109 PPC. When the counsel for the petitioner was confronted as to whether challan of the FIR has been submitted, he submits that the same has already been submitted before the concerned trial Court. Under the circumstances, the instant petition being not maintainable is dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to seek alternate remedy to approach the concerned trial Court by moving application under Section 249-A or 265-A Cr.P.C. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS/*
